Engagements related to market systems, capital structuring, and implementation.

Partner With Us

Whether you're exploring a program partnership, seeking strategic advisory, considering investment opportunities, or interested in market systems development, we'd like to hear from you.

Confidentiality

Send a Message

Fill out the form below and we will follow up by email or phone as appropriate.

By submitting this form, you acknowledge that SPX will process your information in accordance with our privacy policy. We respect confidentiality and will not share your information without permission.

Prefer a Direct Conversation?

If you'd rather discuss your market opportunity directly, feel free to email us at info@spxafrica.com or call us at +251930199525. We're happy to schedule an introductory call to explore collaboration opportunities.
